## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Related issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or internal change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds with no type errors
- [ ] Docs updated (README, CHANGELOG, schema, or skill template) if behavior changed
- [ ] New capability or adapter? Tests and the conformance matrix are updated
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or absolute local paths committed
